name: Calculus I
description: Limits, derivatives, integrals. Foundation for all upper-division STEM.

name: Calculus II
description: Integration techniques, sequences, series, polar coordinates.

name: Introduction to Numerical Analysis
description: Numerical solution of nonlinear equations, systems of linear equations, and ordinary differential equations. Interpolating polynomials, numerical differentiation, and numerical integration. Computer implementation.
notes: General elective option for CS B.S. Catalog prereqs: MATH 224 and a programming course
